result.stdout:
Description:
  SonarQube CLI - A command-line interface for SonarQube and SonarCloud

Usage:
  sq [command] [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                       Enable verbose logging
  -i, --instance <instance>           Use specific instance
  -f, --format <Csv|Json|Table|Yaml>  Output format: table, json, csv, yaml [default: Table]
  --force-v1                          Force use of V1 API even if V2 is available
  -o, --organization <organization>   Override organization (required for SonarCloud)
  --version                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                      Show help and usage information

Commands:
  config                                 Manage SonarQube CLI configuration
  projects                               Manage projects
  issues                                 Manage issues
  hotspots                               Manage security hotspots
  analysis                               Manage project analysis
  qg, quality-gate, qualitygate          Manage quality gates
  metrics                                View project metrics
  users                                  Manage users
  permissions                            Manage permissions
  system                                 System administration commands
  rules                                  Manage rules and rule definitions
  qp, quality-profiles, qualityprofiles  Manage quality profiles
  sca                                    Software Composition Analysis commands (requires SonarQube 2025.4+ Enterprise Edition or SonarCloud)
  devops                                 Manage DevOps platform integrations
  entitlements                           License entitlements commands (requires Enterprise/Data Center Edition)
  groups                                 Group management commands
  webhooks                               Manage webhooks
  branches                               Manage project branches
  init                                   Initialize project context for the current directory

Description:
  Show analysis history for a project

Usage:
  sq analysis history [<project>] [options]

Arguments:
  <project>  Project key (uses project context if not specified)

Options:
  -F, --fields <fields>                Comma-separated list of fields to include in output
  --no-headers                         Suppress headers in table output
  -p, --page <page>                    Page number for paginated results (1-based)
  --page-size <page-size>              Number of items per page
  --pr, --pull-request <pull-request>  Pull request key for PR-specific operations
  -b, --branch <branch>                Branch name
  --from <from>                        Start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  --to <to>                            End date (YYYY-MM-DD)
  -c, --category <category>            Filter by event category (VERSION, QUALITY_GATE, QUALITY_PROFILE, OTHER)
  -v, --verbose                        Enable verbose logging
  -i, --instance <instance>            Use specific instance
  -f, --format <Csv|Json|Table|Yaml>   Output format: table, json, csv, yaml [default: Table]
  --force-v1                           Force use of V1 API even if V2 is available
  -o, --organization <organization>    Override organization (required for SonarCloud)
  -?, -h, --help                       Show help and usage information
